content: Summarize the NDA between ACME Corp and Widget Inc
Extracted 12 pages of text from NDA.pdf
The NDA requires both parties to maintain confidentiality for 3 years. Key terms: mutual obligations, no carve-outs for public info, governing law is Delaware.
reasoning: I identified the key obligations: confidentiality period is 3 years, mutual NDA so both parties have equal obligations, no carve-outs for publicly available information which is unusual. Governing law is Delaware per Section 12.
